description: External client input contract for delegation-outcome.append.

predecessor_id.description: Existing record id for lifecycle transition operations.

authority.description: Requested authority class for the evidence. Runtime derives routability from producer provenance.

confidence.description: Confidence classification for the admitted evidence.

source_type.description: Source type for provenance, such as proof-receipt, review-comment, telemetry, or local-json-ledger.

source_ref.description: Exact source reference used for duplicate/idempotency and audit.

producer_class.description: Producer class resolved by the operation boundary.

assignment_route.description: Assignment route observed for this outcome.

proof_observation.description: Proof observation associated with the outcome.

review_observation.description: Review observation associated with the outcome.

uncertainty_state.description: Uncertainty state preserved for non-routing evidence.

idempotency_key.description: Stable idempotency key supplied by the producer.
